reason: Unlocking the Chain-of-Thought (CoT) skill is a priority to ensure higher accuracy on complex or higher-level questions. This will maximize the chances of gaining XP and reaching the next Skill Point threshold without losing HP.

Unlocking pe_plan is a high-priority strategic move. It grants a planning block and a reflection call, which significantly increases accuracy and provides a safety net for difficult questions. Since I have 1 SP available, this is the most effective way to utilize it before attempting a higher-level door.
Unlocking 'pe_reflect' allows for a dedicated reflection LLM call after the initial answer, which significantly increases accuracy and helps preserve HP while maximizing XP gain in the long run.
